Explain one optimization used in ultrafast fine-tuning. Ultrafast fine-tuning is a technique used to speed up the process of training a neural network, particularly for transfer learning tasks where the goal is to adapt a pre-trained model to a new task. One key optimization used in ultrafast fine-tuning is **Gradient Clipping**.
